raw_reaction: 良い別解だ。停止時刻も期待値も正しく捉えているが、生涯忘れないと言うほどではない。
reason: The boundary-growth renewal argument is correct and concise, but the mass-transport framing is close to the standard M'(r)=M proof and leaves the infinitesimal/o(h) justification implicit, so it is not strong enough for the target line.
